segments.text: You can't imagine how a mother who has so many beautiful children sees them in such
joyous mood with their families, the children nicely settled up.
It's very satisfying to see you all so much enjoy and complete oneness
One has to realize only one thing, that though you are many still compared with the population
of this world we're very few who really know true knowledge.
The real Knowledge – You ARE the people who are knowledgeable no doubt but also
The knowledge, which is not being adorned with truth or
Which Is Not the true Knowledge has no meaning.
All that vanishes into thin air because it's artificial
By your Kundalini awakening you all have achieved
That state where we can say
You know what real knowledge is
But think of the people who do not know what knowledge is.
We take, for example we say that our knowledge
it's nothing but love
What one should understand a discrimination
The knowledge
That his love within you
Is just emitting out from your being
You don't have to assert
You don't have to think, you do not need read some sort of poetry or go into a romantic
mood.
It's just pure love which emits and this is the knowledge also!
How we relate it in such way?
The knowledge that one has about oneself is evidently expressed on your fingertips
and about others also, you know about others
And About Yourself. This is the greatest
subtle knowledge
You have! No one knows like that. Apart from you people
no-one else knows about themselves or about others
So this Knowledge which has come to you
Which Is extremely subtle
extremely secretive, absolutely secret.
If you know about somebody – You Know!
Others do not know that you know
About them and so this knowledge
That we have got is nothing but love
It's very difficult to make
Knowledge & Love put together
Because our idea of knowledge
Is very different
What We read from the books
How can you love from the books?
What Love means our attachments.
To us in ignorance we get attached to people,to children , family and things . By getting
attachment it is proved that do not have knowledge.
If You Have the Knowledge then all attachments should just drop out and become a global
personality, a drop in the ocean.
For example we are attached to many things like
you're attached over family something happens
and then finally
We get very disturbed
You can't bear it
if anything happened
our children
which is horrible
It's just
The whole world
Is falling on
Then
from family
you move on, you are attached to your friends and neighbours. You're also
attache to the country. Attachment of
Your Country is not knowledge
Once
you are a realised soul
just start seeing
your country clearly
what wrong it has got
What
ignorance
in what darkness it exists
And in what way it is quarreling, fighting for rights and things.
But with the knowledge that you have within yourself
You see so clearly
What's a problem of your country
Then try to improve
That through Your love
Means The power
Of Your Knowledge
Is Love
If we all have the knowledge
Within us
And if you are just sitting at home and meditating, it is no meaning.
What we have to go about – tell people…you've got meet other people your friends or family
another relations of out knowledge If cannot do that then our knowledge not with
love It's such a connection between the two
You feel like telling everybody that you've got your Realization.
Feel like tell everyone
That, you are a realized soul
But in there to be that you're expressing your ego
All right? By some other way
Some others methods
U can express them
That u have the true knowledge
When we had false knowledge
We can get ego
You think I know so much
I know about these, I know the color of the carpets all the shades everything.
Any stupid thing if you think that your are very great – that's a sign of stupidity
in our head also…that this is really good to be known."
Now we have discovered through all kinds of acquiring knowledge throughout world what
There are wars going on, there's all kinds of destructions coming in.
I saw it the television this George is a whirlwind which was going down and he killing
so many people destroying to much without understanding what He doing but His there
And he's acting very well.
So is it that He doesn't understand, or Is It That He Understands?
and that His doing something just to correct people.
This also we should have full idea like yesterday when I came here
it was raining heavily, and then I sat down
And suddenly stopped. Stopped till the whole program
Was over! Till i spoke
It wasn't working
But suddenly when you started clapping
Also we started clapping
That's what is was
So even nature knows
Who You are
but you must know The Nature
This Is a point
Nature will act according to what your level of spirituality is.
Surprisingly, I always felt that there cannot be levels
of spirituality –
i felt once you get Realization
You are There!
But later on discovered
That was wrong
It's not so
Even after getting Realization
People had
So many obstructions in rising
There were so many temptations which we are keeping them down.
So one had to work out on different chakras, different nadis somehow or other to make
you perfect because the perfection within only will give your authority use this knowledge
there as I told two ways of doing it . The other day i have told that you should not
It's human nature to react, it is absolutely humane but if you have become super-human
we should not react.
By no reacting will grow definitely will grow . But If You React Then You Cannot
Grow because you are working under the pressure of other thing that Is Not Yourself
Now supposing as I said i see this carpets ,I know the color and This And That and
react to it, finished. I will not have any sense of judgment if i react
but If don't react then
and know whether these carpets have got vibrations or are they
emitting vibrations? Now what
are this vibrations that is the love so
The communication
Is like
This issue
Have
light you can see things. So when you see thing, the Light is there and light gives
your perception – it give's to vision of seeing this. In a same way if we are enlightened
what happens that these vibrations start flowing just like the light? And in
light you can see things which are good and bad. But sometimes we put the same parameters
as human beings do, like if go to some house very nice or a very good house all these
thing make us happy but actually what about that House? Is it having good vibration
or it's having bad vibrations.
Is worth living there,
Or not?
Like the other day they told me
They can get a very nice place in Milan
little beyond Milan
on rent
Very cheap
I said why is so cheap
Immediately
I felt the vibration of that place
Did you go and see the vibrations
Of this place
Then went and saw
It was all burning
Then they found out that there was a Scientology there for years together, and said – That's
not the place where you can live.
You have to be very pure being!
Even hut of poor man could better than this comfortable so-called place."
So one has use the vibrations all time understand everything what we are doing
In that also you can be misleading him, some people feel vibrations and they tell Me Mother
I felt the vibrations.
And i felt should marry this man."
He said," You did fell the vibration?
Yes?"
Very much!
And ,I must marry his man .And when he see a man I will see the booth in Him.
My God what sort of vibrations this lady has felt about him.
So in your judgment, what is there? There's no pure knowledge.
See how connected they are.
Vibrations which love and also
the other thing you have to know about is the knowledge
The Pure Knowledge or True Knowledge
We can say that Pure Knowledge
And true knowledge
Is like energy
Like electricity
And the way you feel it,
The Way You understand It,
It exists. That is love!
People don't also understand what Love Is
They get mad after someone and
say that Mother I think
I am in love with this person
After five days they will come and say
No Mother, I won' t have anything to do with him
Why? Because
You have not got the pure knowledge, you do not feel
The Pure Knowledge in that person through your vibrations.
Now see how connected it is!
Like we can say the sun and sunlight
What's difference between them two?
Sun is there when sun comes there is sunlight
So what' s a difference?
Or We Can Say Moon & Moonlight
What is the difference?
There's no different in these two things.
One, it' s a moon and another one is light
so all this thing are very very confusing
that we don't understand how confused
We're about to
And you do not understand
How our vibrations can mislead us
Because vibrations
Are there
All right
But sometimes, even if they are missing just to justify yourself you will say we have vibration
and feel that it's very good excellent.
And later on you'll discover this is not so
So Even now when realize we should know what is encompassing us which
is around us, but it's that which makes feel that ah…it' s all right. It is good we
should have it." Once you start understanding the vibrations of pure knowledge are a very
different age then your not attached to person or family or country nothing! But
But what you feel is the pure vibrations coming to your.
This a point which very confusing, when You say my vibrations are good I like those vibrations
and while we jump into ocean of filth many people have asked Me Mother why it sometimes
We make mistakes?
You do not make mistakes, it's your ignorance which is darkness and that' s why whenever
you plunge into to fall in trouble.
So understand our knowledge has be completely clear like suppose we have a lamp its dirty
In the same way, if our heart is not clean – especially our hearts.
If it's not clean then we start doing things believing that its right and by which you
hurt yourself or others."
It' s a very common error in human nature to identify wrong thinks as rights
And just to make themselves look such a great, such a divine thing.
As I told you now there are people who want
say divide the country – simple reason they wanted to do that
Now their wants to decide this thing
Divide because they have importance
The few of them will instigate others
and tell all right we must have freedom
If we have freedom, will this country for ourselves.
Then you can develop ourself or a part of the countries which is richer and better off
they would think that it's all right to have money towards themselves so they divide
They can divide in the name of religion, uh…in the name or prosperity whatever it is.
But if you divide a country actually are facing big problem because we have seen that wherever
people divided they fall into kind of dark-dark dungeon from where cannot come out its
It's just a few people whose ego is that they want to have some land as their own,
but the die.
Not only died – Some of them are murdered and like all this idea we will have this
possession goes away so in same way you can see on smaller things also.
In smaller things also we are very much identified that if I have this thing then everything will
be fine.
You cannot understand how people just jump at things and say, Oh Mother!
This is ours ,this is our's . We must do these for ourselves openly they don't
think it wrong to say That this my country i must go from my country and another says
that this is my country, I must do for My Country.
As long as there's This My and I
That means
There Is No Knowledge
The knowledge
–as i told you pure knowledge
–is what gives You a Pure Light
Pure light means pure vibrations
Now vibrations can be misleading
or could the quantity of vibrations
Can Be less Or more
But another way to see
is to see for yourself why do you want
To Do a particular thing.
Mental also, You can use
parameter of mental understanding
Why I Want to do it?
What Is the gain For all people
If we start thinking from that angle
That what's The Gain for others
What will they gain by this
Why should i be amazed
We'll get real picture
Of what your doing
So u must keep yourself
All the time in a state where you witness yourself,
You see Yourself that why am I doing this?
What is The purpose.
Sometimes it could be some conditioning
Could Be Some sort of a psychological thing
It would be anything
But if we start watching carefully
Why i'm Doing it
We'll be amazed
That your vibrations itself will
Start telling on our fingertips
But sometimes the vibrations are so superficially coming,
ah I got the vibrations and this and that.
For these reasons I am saying again
though you're such a nice family of Mine
we all are so much blessed
And have so many knowledge with us
We should be very wise
If there is no wisdom
if it's not wisdom
We can never understand what we are doing.
Now to develop this wisdom,
What have you do?
Say every time
You say anything they'll come otherwise
Mother how did get the wisdom
?What is a way of getting the Wisdom?
Wisdom already within you
Shri Ganesha
Already there who gives you the wisdom
But you must take to Shri Ganesh
There I find people become
So much addicted to Shri Ganesh
that they lose his identity completely.
They become very slavish about the whole thing
and, uh...they just believe
That oh..They are very spiritual
..they're very great
All these false ideas
Are no good
Thus your Ganesha gives you wisdom
Now You must count how many wise things have we done so far
Where did you take a very wise decision?
Have You been wise to do something or have We just doing it because we are identified
with the particular type of life, a particular time of answer.
So wisdom is thing that gives us first of all complete peace if your wisdom has developed
then become very peaceful whatever people may say what they will be able to do and
aggression they may do, whatever it is. You are peaceful and you see the stupidity of
other persons –of their nations-and understand why they're doing that? This wisdom
Is such an important thing in your one being because animals don't have so much
Wisdom as we had sometimes off course sometimes even less than animals have but still by
experience, you see. We have to learn that we've been making mistakes – so many mistakes
we committed so far! Now are going commit more mistakes or are
be wise? Wisdom is not apparent outside… You can't say somebody's wise by looking
at the person but in vibrations who will know
that, That person is extremely wise.
He may speak he may not speak
if you speaks he'll speak about
something so deep
So wide and nice without hurting him
this kind of temperament
If You develop it's to become wise
for every question
For example some are very attached with their children
So much attached that they forget
They are part and parcel of this divine force
And just start doing all kinds things
The other day I met one lady whose son was very sick
She took him to the hospital
Doctors gave her all kind medicines
Here he came even worse
Then she telephones me
Mother,I don't know what happened
I went to the doctor and doctor gave him this
treatment,
And a child has become sick.
But why didn't you ask Me before?
Why did You go
To hospital first?
Lack of wisdom!
Am there
,why don'y you asked Me?
We had one case here in Kabila
There was One Child who fell down
.and broke His arm
Now
The Mother
Didn''t show any wisdom
She took the child
to the hospital and doctor said tomorrow we are going operate her, put some artificial
arm inside.
But father was sensible he said all right today I will take child at home.
He brought that child in night about 3 o'clock .I said alright , i put it right next day
when you took him into a hospital but now there is no need for operation because
is all right. See the difference, one is worried immediately they will go to doctor instead
of consulting Me asking Me – there are Sahaja Yogis but then we'll ask a Doctor
do something about it and once the Doctor starts doing some thing than They come to
Me. There's lots miracles which have taken place about Sahaj Yoga I must say
And in that you should see the wisdom helps.
Of course my attention is there always, no doubt but still You shouldn't take it for
granted –you have to ask!
One day I was just sitting and thought of telephoning somebody at the Ashram of
New York…
I never telephoned there, so I found out the phone number we telephoned and asked if…
…I said is a child all right?
So leader was surprised because that boy had fallen in water for quite some time.
And he's filled with water even his brain has been filled up with water as usual
there were some doctors who said that he cannot survive and if he survives his brain has so
much water, then it can not be normal.
So I just say don't worry – nobody told me the boy will be all right completely!
They was surprised how i had said this to them.
Firstly they knew about the fall of a boy or something like that but they didn't
know how I said he'll be all right and He was alright, is perfectly alight.
So they were surprised at My knowing about it that how is It that Mother knows there
a boy who's so sick?
Here i will say its pure knowledge you see my attention Is always around You people
Always dealing with you people and how I know is this that this attention of mine, it's global
so anything happens to You any
upsetting takes place in a
I should say
Deviation
Takes Place my attention is there
And immediately. I knew they're something wrong somewhere
And I don't know how My attention goes to particular places, which makes it life better.
It helps people in need –
…I do not anything about this Attention but
This Attention is the wisdom
The Wisdom that spreads all over
With That Wisdom you Know what's wrong with another person
or any other organization that is in Sahaja Yoga, everything you come to know.
If want it's different – just like spread out everywhere
For example if we have a telephone then use the phone
but for me I don't need the telephone
So this has come from pure and innocent wisdom
The innocent wisdom is just like a child.
It's everywhere and it communicates
And tells what the matter,
What problem there was

many of them

Did you see our chakras
Did You find out what went wrong

l will give to Param Chaitanya

that can you live everything
to Param Chaitanya
In your wisdom

The real knowledge within
That's a level for some people are
I am now so sure about
Those who get realization
Are all so much filled with pure knowledge

With experience they learn and with meeting people
They learn
But as the wisdom pure wisdom is difficult for
Them because
The do not rely entirely on the Paramchaitanya
Everything happens just
Param Chaitanya knows it understands, it organizes.
It loves – he does everything that's the energy it is!
He does every thing and how it manages?
How we call coincidences are really organized by Param Chaitanya
As I told you yesterday way the rain was
The rain came an went away
It has wisdom, innately it knows I am sitting here the program is going to start stops.
Flowers know me you don't we have flowers they are of this size and i dont do anything

How do they know?
Because their natural.

of curtsies these that…
All this is not necessary!
All the stupid practices which you have adopted sometimes keep us away from pure
knowledge but when there's no pure knowledge then what happens to it?
You just get frightened for small things, upset for some other thing – I mean it's
something very surprising to see Sahaja Yogis getting upset among the hundred people if
supposing there is a problem.
So you are a sahaja yogi and have to witness that and then see!
If cannot do so than we're not a sahajyogi but this isn't like practicing, they
They say, if you have to have the blessings of Shiva
You must say 108 times His name.
That's not a way! He doesn't like it
See nobody likes that kind of murmuring
Somebody comes and takes your name all time
Nearer door he'll throw him out
So...that is no tthe waay
It' s wrong idea
that you are gone, taking the name of somebody and that deity will help.
First-of all You have to become wise enough
To understand
That YOU ARE A PART AND PARSAL OF PARAM CHAITAN
Everything will work out by then
And it works so beautifully
Of course some people had hard time I don't say they didn' t have
But it is not hard, because you are one with Param Chaitanya and
You know that It's doing the job.
You're Not feeling that hardness or sickness
All people who write to Me about their problems
I don't Know what To say
Just Say That Do YOU believe in Param Chaitanya?
Alright!
IT knows
It Knows What Is to be done
It knows what is to be corrected, it know'st he can create poetry and music but do you
leave everything for the Param Chaitanya?
This was a second point in wisdom.
Do You have wisdom that leaves everything to Param Chaitana after experiencing also
Like there was one lady who going in the car and she found her car, the brakes were breaking
And She didn't know what to do now.
The brakes are not no more how will She manage it?
It's because of Germany
All cars moving very fast
So She put Her head on the steering wheel
and she said, I'll leave it to Paramchaitanya.
She says, she leaves is me – all right! It's the same
so by saying that what happened?
She said Mother…I don't know
when i raised my head
…I found My car was taken on one side of road
And nobody was there
All cars were passing by
but somehow or other this car
was taken there very nicely by some force.
So the wisdom lies in understanding, working of Paramchaitanya – how it guides you?
How helps and preserves You depending on Paramchaitanya can continue to be living
very happily I think in Sahaja Yoga we have lost very few sahajogis they live for
They don't die, and if you ask their experiences is very amazing how it works out.
If they want – do not to live also then can pass but in the one to leave Paramchaitanya
takes over anew from wrong what living long doesn' t mean that go on bothering yourself
as too much we will do with your money or how would be the source all these nonsensical
worries come to you all right, then the Paramchaitanya says alright. Go on worrying! If
You go and worry it doesn't matter what will happen whatever has
To Happen Will Happen but Param Chaitanya can interfere in case we leave
It to Param Chaitanya he said many a times leave it
God, leave it to god. But God means I don't know what they mean by God? God means Paramchaitanya
– God is divine force that's working everything so another way of looking at
It Is the wisdom we should understand each and every particle in this world is created
by Divine, by the divine force and this particle everything is completely under
guidance
supervision of Param Chaitanya. Nothing can move unless until
Param Chaitanya works on it
It's something so connected globally
So much there that people don't realize
What they are doing what we should have done
I mean on many scales you find something happening, like supposing
Something is happening now in America. Just try to
Find out what america has done
To other countries
Immediately will get the answer
so also it takes
Full care of The persons who believe In Paramchaitanya
Who give everything in the hands of Paramchaitanya
We give things to the police, we'll give it to doctors and some civil people or engineers
who do somethings.
But they can make mistakes –they create problems but you leave them for Paramchaitanya
It's so remarkable that in my own life I've seen all of time it works for me
I was building a house in Pune and we had to put a slab, very-very big slab – needed
about three hundred bags of cement for that.
So i got the cment an'i got he people but they said you should start early morning
& u can finish next mornin', twenty four hours.
I say alright so at about five o'clock I told let's go, the work is over.
How do you know?
I said, let's go and see.
So imagine which was going to finish after twelve hours – it had already finished!
And all the workers were walking about…and everybody said, Mother this is a miracle
how can such big slab be laid in so short time?!
To make them understand that Hanuman must have done their job.
But these people are part of that Paramchaitanya.
Now you are worshipping the Mother.
To worship The Mother is a biggest thing because all these deities and everybody,
on Her children under Her command ,under Her desire .
So to worship The Mother they story of as we know about Ganesha that
The mother said that, the one who goes round Mother Earth three times I will give him a
present.
So Shri Ganesha thought in his wisdom – Who is greater than my mother?
No-one else because he knew He cannot compete with His brother
who has got a peacock for the conveyance.
So he said, how can I go round and win over this person?
The best is to take two wisdoms
My mother's greater than everything else
so went around his Mother three times
And He won the prize
and the other brother was just still moving on.
When he came back,
He found that present is already lost!
So again I'll say it's wisdom
That helps you to leave everything
To Param Chaitanya
And this something for a modern person
Very difficult honestly
You can't calculate 2 plus two
It so bad because of these computers
and things like that, is absolutely hopeless as far any mathematical calculations are needed.
Now I must say –I don't know how to handle a computer or any calculator but if you ask me just
like that, Mother how much will it be? I'll say so much and It Will Be That. It Will
tell a some wrong thing just to mislead the person, then I may say something.
But normally – and know it is that but not like we will do…
…I don't think so you develop your knowledge in such an extent that you can
But your wisdom, if you start using
Your Wisdom it will always come handy.
In anything that You do think of the wisdom
My advice to
Is
That as Your Mother loves
The whole world
Loves all
OfYou and cares for those who haven't even got
Realization

In a manner all the time saying
You are catching this,
Your a Bhooth
your these
or those
I never said it to anyone
So
It shouldn't say like
That
There is no love
there's
No

The understanding
Is
That
We were just
Same
As the person was
And now
we are
Knowledgeable
so
You must
Use
Your knowledge
To correct
This person
Not
Put him down

the other person.
Most of Sahaja Yoga work sometimes I've seen stops because we are very methodical
–we become like great teachers and start telling them stories–and then they get
fed up with us!
So when handling people as i said-we have to spread their knowledge, very important
We cannot keep it to ourselves.
But is not for any ambition, or leadership ,or recognition but just the use of our wisdom
and knowledge that we want help others out-of love – no recognition nor position nothing
Just we want to do it because We love them and I am sure this should work out very effectively
And the person who will be helped or persons that are being help
Will just bound you, because they find their true knowledge
But supposing somebody comes for you says he knows his true knowledge
You might know him but i have known what u know
Then you ask that person, then he'll give a big lecture.
You say no! That's not the thing
Just smile and see it as if nothing
The things is
true knowledge
Is apart and parcel of your being
It just within him
He does not
some sort off concrete stuff
but we have read or understood
But
It has become
A light within
And that light is there
It has no, it's not necessity for you to be very well-educated or
To Be Very Intelligent Or To Be Very Highly Place. Not Necessary
Its How Your Heart Is Clean
In The Heart It Resides
Imagine All Other Knowledge Resides in the Brain
While The Pure Knowledge Resides
in the heart, very surprising.
But we do not know also that actually our hearts rules head there are seven auras around
heart which control the brain in such a manner that we act on hands of the Paramchaitanya.
Unless and until your heart is clean, unless an until you have beautiful image or person
who very-very pure – You cannot do anything mentally!
And from your heart, if you have to do it –
Your Heart has be very clean and extremely wise.
This is the point one must jump into that
your heart … Is It Wise?
For example… To get attached too much
identified with someone shows
That your heart not clean
Has so many bondages
Open up your heart fully
And that's why they say the goddess resides in her heart, in Her center-heart.
She resides on the centre of Her Heart because she is so balanced!
She resides at the center of Her Heart as Shakti and gives you all what You want within
In you she is settled down as many things, You know the shlokas which says that She is
settled within us like knowledge.
She's settled with in Us a memory and She has settled within us asleep also She has
settled Within us as illusion, Branti.
She's the one who puts us into illusions because we are not yet fully perfected.
We have to become paripakva, means absolutely matured – till you're mature this Mother
Herself put You in illusion and plays around so that you learn how be wise!
So, one should understand that she is playing around with you and if try to be very careful
as not falling into her maya because when She puts You in the Maya will go round-and-round
and you'll reach down there.
So this power of Brhanti is also very important,
This delusion we can call it or which
I just called a thing by
she creates drama in
Which You become like
A stupid man being found out
so this stupidity
And all that
Can be removed
By this Brhanthi
That She Creates
And this power of pranati is because
human beings as they are,
Because we will not understand something straight forward.
So it has to go round and around
till there reach a point where you can understand
that
It was the play
The mother
That brought them
To their shore
Of wisdom
so for us
it is important to see that so much has been done by Paramchaitanya for us, the Mother
Has Done So Much For Us.
Now what are we going do ourselves?
To get all these powers she's given as completely enlightened and developed
What have we done so far?
Nothing to be done as such, but to develop a kind of deep devotion.
Deep understanding and that depth is possible absolutely because now you are on your way
to that perfection.
So today, in Cabela is the last puja and I want
tell you as a mother
That all should depend on Paramchaitanya
It's very important
